1252                    <strong style="color:#0a7c48">✓ <?php esc_html_e( 'Turnstile is configured.', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1253                    <?php esc_html_e( 'The Join application form and the Newsletter Subscribe form both require human verification before they accept a submission.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1254                </p>
1255            <?php else : ?>
1256                <div class="notice notice-warning inline" style="margin:0">
1257                    <p>
1258                        <strong><?php esc_html_e( 'Turnstile is not configured.', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1259                        <?php esc_html_e( 'Your Join application form is public — anyone can submit an application, and a submitted (and confirmed) application still emails every admitted artist and admin. Right now the only thing standing between that form and an automated bot is a fixed 5-submissions-per-minute-per-IP limit, which a distributed bot can work around entirely. Add a Cloudflare Turnstile site key and secret key above to require human verification on both the Join form and the Newsletter Subscribe form.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1260                    </p>
1261                </div>
1262            <?php endif; ?>
1263        </div>
1264        <?php
1265    }
1266
1267    /**
1268     * AI-processor privacy-policy reminder (seventh audit §4d — "optionally,
1269     * an admin notice when an AI provider is configured but no
1270     * privacy-policy page is set... consider a note pointing operators to
1271     * obtain a DPA"). Only rendered at all when at least one AI provider's
1272     * API key is actually configured — with none configured, no artist or
1273     * visitor content is being sent anywhere yet, so there's nothing to
1274     * warn about. Mirrors render_turnstile_warning()'s own
1275     * green-confirmation/amber-warning shape.
1276     */
1277    private function render_privacy_policy_notice(): void {
1278        $openai_configured    = '' !== (string) get_option( 'agnosis_openai_api_key', '' );
1279        $anthropic_configured = '' !== (string) get_option( 'agnosis_anthropic_api_key', '' );
1280
1281        if ( ! $openai_configured && ! $anthropic_configured ) {
1282            return;
1283        }
1284
1285        $providers = array_filter( [
1286            $openai_configured ? __( 'OpenAI', 'agnosis' ) : '',
1287            $anthropic_configured ? __( 'Anthropic', 'agnosis' ) : '',
1288        ] );
1289        $provider_list = implode( ', ', $providers );
1290
1291        $has_policy = function_exists( 'get_privacy_policy_url' ) && '' !== get_privacy_policy_url();
1292        ?>
1293        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1294            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'AI Processing & Privacy Policy', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1295            <?php if ( $has_policy ) : ?>
1296                <p>
1297                    <strong style="color:#0a7c48">✓ <?php esc_html_e( 'A Privacy Policy page is set.', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1298                    <?php
1299                    printf(
1300                        /* translators: %s: comma-separated list of configured AI providers, e.g. "OpenAI, Anthropic" */
1301                        esc_html__( 'Suggested wording covering %s and public federation was added to it automatically — review it under Settings → Privacy → "Guide" before publishing, and check with your provider(s) about their own data processing agreement (DPA) for your compliance obligations.', 'agnosis' ),
1302                        esc_html( $provider_list )
1303                    );
1304                    ?>
1305                </p>
1306            <?php else : ?>
1307                <div class="notice notice-warning inline" style="margin:0">
1308                    <p>
1309                        <strong><?php esc_html_e( 'No Privacy Policy page is set.', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1310                        <?php
1311                        printf(
1312                            /* translators: %s: comma-separated list of configured AI providers, e.g. "OpenAI, Anthropic" */
1313                            esc_html__( 'Submitted artwork, text, and visitor contact messages are sent to %s for processing. Create or choose a page under Settings → Privacy — this plugin has already prepared suggested wording you\'ll find there under "Guide". You may also want to review that provider\'s data processing agreement (DPA) for your own compliance obligations.', 'agnosis' ),
1314                            esc_html( $provider_list )
1315                        );
1316                        ?>
1317                        <a href="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'options-privacy.php' ) ); ?>"><?php esc_html_e( 'Go to Settings → Privacy', 'agnosis' ); ?></a>
1318                    </p>
1319                </div>
1320            <?php endif; ?>
1321        </div>
1322        <?php
1323    }
1324
1325    /**
1326     * Debug Files panel — shown under Settings → General, below the Save
1327     * Changes button. The debug on/off toggle itself is a normal Settings
1328     * API field (agnosis_debug_enabled, saved via options.php); this panel
1329     * only surfaces read-only state (directory, file count, wp-config
1330     * override) and the destructive "Clear Debug Files" action, which needs
1331     * its own admin-post round trip rather than the shared settings form.
1332     */
1333    private function render_debug_panel(): void {
1334        $debug_enabled  = Debug::enabled();
1335        $debug_dir      = Debug::dir();
1336        $debug_count    = Debug::file_count();
1337        $const_defined  = Debug::constant_defined();
1338        $const_value    = Debug::constant_value();
1339        ?>
1340        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1341            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Debug Files', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1342
1343            <table class="form-table" role="presentation" style="margin-bottom:0"><tbody>
1344                <tr>
1345                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Currently', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1346                    <td>
1347                        <?php if ( $debug_enabled ) : ?>
1348                            <strong style="color:#0a7c48">✓ <?php esc_html_e( 'Enabled', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1349                        <?php else : ?>
1350                            <strong style="color:#c0392b">✗ <?php esc_html_e( 'Disabled', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong>
1351                        <?php endif; ?>
1352                        <?php if ( $const_defined ) : ?>
1353                            <p class="description">
1354                                <?php
1355                                if ( $const_value ) {
1356                                    esc_html_e( 'Forced ON by the AGNOSIS_DEBUG constant in wp-config.php — the checkbox above has no effect until that line is removed.', 'agnosis' );
1357                                } else {
1358                                    esc_html_e( 'Forced OFF by the AGNOSIS_DEBUG constant in wp-config.php — the checkbox above has no effect until that line is removed.', 'agnosis' );
1359                                }
1360                                ?>
1361                            </p>
1362                        <?php endif; ?>
1363                    </td>
1364                </tr>
1365                <tr>
1366                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Directory', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1367                    <td>
1368                        <code><?php echo esc_html( $debug_dir ); ?></code>
1369                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Filter with agnosis_debug_dir to redirect debug output elsewhere.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1370                    </td>
1371                </tr>
1372                <tr>
1373                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Files', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1374                    <td>
1375                        <strong><?php echo esc_html( number_format_i18n( $debug_count ) ); ?></strong>
1376                        <?php esc_html_e( '.txt file(s) in the directory', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1377                    </td>
1378                </tr>
1379            </tbody></table>
1380
1381            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="margin-top:1rem"
1382                  onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Delete all .txt files in the debug directory? The directory itself stays in place so future debug writes still land cleanly.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>');">
1383                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_clear_debug_files">
1384                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_clear_debug_files' ); ?>
1385                <?php
1386                submit_button(
1387                    __( 'Clear Debug Files', 'agnosis' ),
1388                    'secondary', 'submit', false,
1389                    $debug_count > 0 ? [] : [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ]
1390                );
1391                ?>
1392            </form>
1393        </div>
1394        <?php
1395    }
1396
1397    /**
1398     * Term Translation Cache panel — shown under Settings → General,
1399     * alongside the Debug Files panel. Fourth audit §4d: the AI-translated
1400     * term-name cache (`agnosis_term_translations`, used by
1401     * Compat\LinguaForge::sync_translated_terms()) previously had no UI at
1402     * all — a bad translation of a term label was permanent, since nothing
1403     * ever expired the cache or gave an admin a way to clear it (renaming the
1404     * source term auto-invalidates that one entry as of this same fix — see
1405     * LinguaForge::invalidate_renamed_term_cache() — but a bad translation of
1406     * a term an admin does NOT plan to rename still needed a manual escape
1407     * hatch). Only ever active if Lingua Forge is installed — the cache
1408     * can't exist otherwise.
1409     */
1410    private function render_term_translation_cache_panel(): void {
1411        if ( ! LinguaForge::is_active() ) {
1412            return;
1413        }
1414
1415        $count = LinguaForge::term_translation_cache_count();
1416        ?>
1417        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1418            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Term Translation Cache', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1419
1420            <table class="form-table" role="presentation" style="margin-bottom:0"><tbody>
1421                <tr>
1422                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Cached translations', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1423                    <td>
1424                        <strong><?php echo esc_html( number_format_i18n( $count ) ); ?></strong>
1425                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'AI-translated tag/medium term names, cached so the same term always gets the same translated label instead of a fresh AI phrasing per post. Renaming a term already clears its own cached entry automatically; use the button below only if a cached translation itself is wrong.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1426                    </td>
1427                </tr>
1428            </tbody></table>
1429
1430            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="margin-top:1rem"
1431                  onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Clear every cached term translation? Nothing is deleted from your site — terms will simply be re-translated by AI the next time they\'re needed.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>');">
1432                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_clear_term_translations_cache">
1433                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_clear_term_translations_cache' ); ?>
1434                <?php
1435                submit_button(
1436                    __( 'Clear Term Translation Cache', 'agnosis' ),
1437                    'secondary', 'submit', false,
1438                    $count > 0 ? [] : [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ]
1439                );
1440                ?>
1441            </form>
1442        </div>
1443        <?php
1444    }
1445
1446    private function render_logs_tab(): void {
1447        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.Security.NonceVerification.Recommended -- integer page offset for display only.
1448        $page    = max( 1, (int) sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_GET['log_page'] ?? '1' ) ) );
1449        $per     = 50;
1450        $offset  = ( $page - 1 ) * $per;
1451        $total   = Logger::count();
1452        $entries = Logger::get_entries( $per, $offset );
1453        $pages   = (int) ceil( $total / $per );
1454
1455        $level_colours = [
1456            'info'    => '#0a7c48',
1457            'warning' => '#8a6d3b',
1458            'error'   => '#c0392b',
1459        ];
1460        $level_bg = [
1461            'info'    => '#ecfdf5',
1462            'warning' => '#fef9e7',
1463            'error'   => '#fdf2f2',
1464        ];
1465
1466        ?>
1467        <div style="display:flex;align-items:center;gap:1rem;margin-bottom:1rem">
1468            <h2 style="margin:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Pipeline Logs', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1469            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1470                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_clear_logs">
1471                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_clear_logs' ); ?>
1472                <button type="submit" class="button button-secondary"
1473                    onclick="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Clear all log entries?', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
1474                    <?php esc_html_e( 'Clear All', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1475                </button>
1476            </form>
1477        </div>
1478
1479        <p class="description" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
1480            <?php
1481            printf(
1482                /* translators: %d: total log entry count */
1483                esc_html__( '%d entries total. Logs are pruned automatically according to the Inbox retention setting.', 'agnosis' ),
1484                (int) $total
1485            );
1486            ?>
1487        </p>
1488
1489        <?php if ( empty( $entries ) ) : ?>
1490            <p><?php esc_html_e( 'No log entries yet.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1491        <?php else : ?>
1492            <table class="widefat striped" style="max-width:1200px">
1493                <thead>
1494                    <tr>
1495                        <th style="width:160px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Time', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1496                        <th style="width:80px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Level', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1497                        <th style="width:120px"><?php esc_html_e( 'Context', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1498                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Message', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1499                    </tr>
1500                </thead>
1501                <tbody>
1502                    <?php
1503                    foreach ( $entries as $entry ) :
1504                        $lvl = $entry['level'] ?? 'info';
1505                        $bg  = $level_bg[ $lvl ]  ?? '';
1506                        $fg  = $level_colours[ $lvl ] ?? '#000';
1507                        ?>
1508                        <tr style="background:<?php echo esc_attr( $bg ); ?>">
1509                            <td style="white-space:nowrap;font-family:monospace;font-size:.85em">
1510                                <?php echo esc_html( $entry['created_at'] ); ?>
1511                            </td>
1512                            <td>
1513                                <span style="color:<?php echo esc_attr( $fg ); ?>;font-weight:600;text-transform:uppercase;font-size:.8em">
1514                                    <?php echo esc_html( $lvl ); ?>
1515                                </span>
1516                            </td>
1517                            <td style="font-family:monospace;font-size:.85em;color:#555">
1518                                <?php echo esc_html( $entry['context'] ); ?>
1519                            </td>
1520                            <td><?php echo esc_html( $entry['message'] ); ?></td>
1521                        </tr>
1522                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1523                </tbody>
1524            </table>
1525
1526            <?php if ( $pages > 1 ) : ?>
1527                <div style="margin-top:1rem">
1528                    <?php for ( $p = 1; $p <= $pages; $p++ ) : ?>
1529                        <?php if ( $p === $page ) : ?>
1530                            <strong>[<?php echo (int) $p; ?>]</strong>
1531                        <?php else : ?>
1532                            <a href="<?php echo esc_url( add_query_arg( [ 'page' => 'agnosis-settings', 'tab' => 'logs', 'log_page' => $p ], admin_url( 'admin.php' ) ) ); ?>">
1533                                <?php echo (int) $p; ?>
1534                            </a>
1535                        <?php endif; ?>
1536                    <?php endfor; ?>
1537                </div>
1538            <?php endif; ?>
1539        <?php endif; ?>
1540        <?php
1541    }
1542
1543    private function render_tab_tools( string $tab ): void {
1544        if ( 'general' === $tab ) {
1545            $this->render_turnstile_warning();
1546            $this->render_debug_panel();
1547            $this->render_term_translation_cache_panel();
1548            return;
1549        }
1550        if ( 'ai' === $tab ) {
1551            $this->render_ai_test_tools();
1552            $this->render_privacy_policy_notice();
1553            return;
1554        }
1555        if ( 'community' === $tab ) {
1556            $this->render_admission_dashboard();
1557            $this->render_members_dashboard();
1558            $this->render_invitation_card();
1559            return;
1560        }
1561        if ( 'newsletter' === $tab ) {
1562            $this->render_newsletter_dashboard();
1563            return;
1564        }
1565        if ( 'email' !== $tab ) {
1566            return;
1567        }
1568        ?>
1569        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1570            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Inbox Tools', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1571
1572            <table class="form-table" role="presentation" style="margin-bottom:0"><tbody>
1573                <tr>
1574                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Test connection', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1575                    <td>
1576                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1577                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_test_inbox">
1578                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_test_inbox' ); ?>
1579                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Test IMAP Connection', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1580                        </form>
1581                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Connects to the configured mailbox and reports the total and unseen message count.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1582                    </td>
1583                </tr>
1584                <tr>
1585                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Poll inbox now', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1586                    <td>
1587                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1588                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_poll_now">
1589                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_poll_now' ); ?>
1590                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Poll Inbox Now', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1591                        </form>
1592                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Fetches unseen messages immediately without waiting for WP-Cron. Then click "Process Pending Queue" to run the AI pipeline.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1593                    </td>
1594                </tr>
1595                <tr>
1596                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Process queue', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1597                    <td>
1598                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1599                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_process_queue">
1600                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_process_queue' ); ?>
1601                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Process Pending Queue', 'agnosis' ), 'primary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1602                        </form>
1603                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Immediately runs the AI pipeline on all pending queue items without waiting for WP-Cron. Use this to test the end-to-end flow after a poll.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1604                    </td>
1605                </tr>
1606                <tr>
1607                    <th scope="row"><?php esc_html_e( 'Force reprocess', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1608                    <td>
1609                        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
1610                            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_force_reprocess">
1611                            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_force_reprocess' ); ?>
1612                            <?php submit_button( __( 'Force Reprocess Inbox', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary', 'submit', false ); ?>
1613                        </form>
1614                        <p class="description"><?php esc_html_e( 'Resets failed/stuck/orphaned queue rows back to pending, then immediately polls for unprocessed messages. Then click "Process Pending Queue" to run the AI pipeline. Already-published artworks with valid posts are never re-processed.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1615                    </td>
1616                </tr>
1617            </tbody></table>
1618        </div>
1619        <?php
1620        $this->render_deliverability_card();
1621    }
1622
1623    /**
1624     * "Deliverability" health card on the Email Inbox tab (security audit
1625     * §5c). Read-only diagnostic — never changes sending behavior, headers,
1626     * or configuration. Reports, for each configured From identity
1627     * (community transactional mail, newsletter — see
1628     * Deliverability::identity_report()): whether its domain matches the
1629     * site's own domain, and whether that domain publishes an SPF/DMARC
1630     * record at all (correctness/alignment is out of scope — a plugin can't
1631     * know a shared host's outbound IP without an actual delivered test).
1632     * Also flags a detected SMTP-sending plugin, and offers the same
1633     * one-click "send a test to my address" pattern the newsletter dashboard
1634     * already uses (render_newsletter_test_form()) via CommunityMailer's own
1635     * headers, so the test reflects the same identity workflow mail actually
1636     * sends from.
1637     */
1638    private function render_deliverability_card(): void {
1639        $rows        = Deliverability::identity_report();
1640        $smtp_plugin = Deliverability::detected_smtp_plugin();
1641        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
1642        ?>
1643        <div class="card" style="max-width:800px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1644            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Deliverability', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1645            <p class="description" style="margin-top:0">
1646                <?php esc_html_e( 'A diagnostic check only — nothing here changes how mail is sent. On ordinary hosting (PHP mail(), no SMTP plugin), mail sent from an address that doesn\'t match your site\'s own domain, or from a domain with no SPF/DMARC record at all, is increasingly likely to land in spam or be rejected outright by large mailbox providers. If any row below looks wrong, the most reliable fix is installing an SMTP-sending plugin (WP Mail SMTP, Post SMTP, FluentSMTP, and others all work) configured against a real transactional mail provider, and adding SPF/DMARC records for the domain you send from at your DNS host.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1647            </p>
1648
1649            <table class="widefat striped" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
1650                <thead>
1651                    <tr>
1652                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'From identity', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1653                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Domain matches site?', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1654                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'SPF record', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1655                        <th><?php esc_html_e( 'DMARC record', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1656                    </tr>
1657                </thead>
1658                <tbody>
1659                    <?php foreach ( $rows as $row ) : ?>
1660                        <tr>
1661                            <td>
1662                                <strong><?php echo esc_html( $row['label'] ); ?></strong><br>
1663                                <code><?php echo esc_html( $row['email'] ); ?></code>
1664                            </td>
1665                            <td><?php echo wp_kses_post( $this->deliverability_domain_badge( $row['domain_matches_site'], $row['domain'] ) ); ?></td>
1666                            <td><?php echo wp_kses_post( $this->deliverability_status_badge( $row['spf']['status'] ) ); ?></td>
1667                            <td><?php echo wp_kses_post( $this->deliverability_status_badge( $row['dmarc']['status'] ) ); ?></td>
1668                        </tr>
1669                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1670                    <tr>
1671                        <td><strong><?php esc_html_e( 'SMTP plugin', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong></td>
1672                        <td colspan="3">
1673                            <?php if ( $smtp_plugin ) : ?>
1674                                ✅ 
1675                                <?php
1676                                echo esc_html( sprintf(
1677                                    /* translators: %s: detected plugin name, e.g. "WP Mail SMTP" */
1678                                    __( 'Detected: %s', 'agnosis' ),
1679                                    $smtp_plugin
1680                                ) );
1681                                ?>
1682                            <?php else : ?>
1683                                ⚠️ <?php esc_html_e( 'None of the common SMTP-sending plugins were detected — this site is likely relying on PHP\'s built-in mail(), which most hosts deliver poorly through.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1684                            <?php endif; ?>
1685                        </td>
1686                    </tr>
1687                </tbody>
1688            </table>
1689
1690            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.4rem;align-items:center">
1691                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_deliverability_test">
1692                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_deliverability_test' ); ?>
1693                <label for="agnosis_deliverability_test_email" style="margin:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Send a real test email to:', 'agnosis' ); ?></label>
1694                <input type="email" id="agnosis_deliverability_test_email" name="test_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $current_user->user_email ); ?>" required class="small-text" style="width:14rem">
1695                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Test', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1696            </form>
1697            <p class="description">
1698                <?php esc_html_e( 'Sends one plain-text email from the same community identity used for review/vote/vouch mail. Reaching your inbox is a good sign; landing in spam or not arriving at all confirms a real deliverability problem regardless of what the checks above say.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
1699            </p>
1700        </div>
1701        <?php
1702    }
1703
1704    /** Small inline status pill for an SPF/DMARC lookup result. */
1705    private function deliverability_status_badge( string $status ): string {
1706        return match ( $status ) {
1707            'found'         => '<span style="color:#1a7f37">✅ ' . esc_html__( 'Found', 'agnosis' ) . '</span>',
1708            'not_found'     => '<span style="color:#b32d2e">❌ ' . esc_html__( 'Not found', 'agnosis' ) . '</span>',
1709            'lookup_failed' => '<span style="color:#996800">⚠️ ' . esc_html__( 'DNS lookup failed', 'agnosis' ) . '</span>',
1710            default         => '<span style="color:#888">— ' . esc_html__( 'Unavailable on this host', 'agnosis' ) . '</span>',
1711        };
1712    }
1713
1714    /** Small inline status pill for the From-domain-vs-site-domain comparison. */
1715    private function deliverability_domain_badge( bool $matches, string $domain ): string {
1716        if ( '' === $domain ) {
1717            return '<span style="color:#888">— ' . esc_html__( 'No address configured', 'agnosis' ) . '</span>';
1718        }
1719        return $matches
1720            ? '<span style="color:#1a7f37">✅ ' . esc_html( $domain ) . '</span>'
1721            : '<span style="color:#996800">⚠️ ' . esc_html( $domain ) . '</span>';
1722    }
1723
1724    /**
1725     * admin-post handler: send a one-off deliverability test email using the
1726     * same community/transactional identity real workflow mail sends from.
1727     * Diagnostic only — does not touch any subscriber, queue, or setting.
1728     */
1729    public function handle_send_deliverability_test(): void {
1730        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_deliverability_test' );
1731
1732        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1733            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1734        }
1735
1736        $test_email = sanitize_email( wp_unslash( $_POST['test_email'] ?? '' ) );
1737        $result     = false;
1738
1739        if ( is_email( $test_email ) ) {
1740            $result = wp_mail(
1741                $test_email,
1742                sprintf(
1743                    /* translators: %s: site name */
1744                    __( '[TEST] Deliverability check from %s', 'agnosis' ),
1745                    get_bloginfo( 'name' )
1746                ),
1747                __( "This is a one-off deliverability test from your Agnosis Settings → Email Inbox page. If you're reading this in your inbox (not spam), the community/transactional From identity is deliverable to this address.", 'agnosis' ),
1748                CommunityMailer::text_headers()
1749            );
1750        }
1751
1752        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
1753            [
1754                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1755                'tab'             => 'email',
1756                'agnosis_message' => $result ? 'deliverability_test_sent' : 'deliverability_test_failed',
1757            ],
1758            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1759        ) );
1760        exit;
1761    }
1762
1763    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1764    // Admission dashboard (Community tab)
1765    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1766
1767    /**
1768     * Render the pending applications table on the Community tab.
1769     *
1770     * Shows every application in status='pending' with vouch counts and
1771     * admin-override Admit / Reject buttons.
1772     */
1773    private function render_admission_dashboard(): void {
1774        global $wpdb;
1775
1776        $admission = new Admission();
1777        $required  = $admission->calculate_required();
1778
1779        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1780        $applications = $wpdb->get_results(
1781            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications
1782             WHERE status = 'pending'
1783             ORDER BY applied_at ASC"
1784        );
1785
1786        // Double opt-in (security audit §3a/§4a): a row sits as 'unverified'
1787        // between apply() and the artist clicking the confirm link in their
1788        // email — invisible to the table below by design (it isn't open for
1789        // community review yet). Surfaced as a plain count here only so an
1790        // operator fielding "I applied but nothing happened" doesn't have to
1791        // guess why an applicant isn't listed.
1792        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1793        $unverified_count = (int) $wpdb->get_var(
1794            "SELECT COUNT(*) FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications WHERE status = 'unverified'"
1795        );
1796
1797        ?>
1798        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1799            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Pending Applications', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1800
1801            <?php if ( $unverified_count > 0 ) : ?>
1802                <p class="description" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
1803                    <?php
1804                    printf(
1805                        esc_html(
1806                            /* translators: %d: number of applications awaiting email confirmation */
1807                            _n(
1808                                '%d application is awaiting email confirmation from the applicant and isn\'t listed below yet.',
1809                                '%d applications are awaiting email confirmation from the applicant and aren\'t listed below yet.',
1810                                $unverified_count,
1811                                'agnosis'
1812                            )
1813                        ),
1814                        (int) $unverified_count
1815                    );
1816                    ?>
1817                </p>
1818            <?php endif; ?>
1819
1820            <?php if ( empty( $applications ) ) : ?>
1821                <p style="color:#666"><?php esc_html_e( 'No pending applications.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1822            <?php else : ?>
1823                <p class="description" style="margin-bottom:1rem">
1824                    <?php
1825                    printf(
1826                        /* translators: %d: number of positive votes currently required for admission */
1827                        esc_html__( '%d positive vote(s) currently required for admission.', 'agnosis' ),
1828                        (int) $required
1829                    );
1830                    ?>
1831                </p>
1832                <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
1833                    <thead>
1834                        <tr>
1835                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Applicant', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1836                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Applied', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1837                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Votes', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1838                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Bio / Portfolio', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1839                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Actions', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1840                        </tr>
1841                    </thead>
1842                    <tbody>
1843                    <?php foreach ( $applications as $app ) : ?>
1844                        <?php
1845                        /** @var object{id: string, display_name: string, email: string, applied_at: string, bio: string|null, portfolio_url: string|null} $app */
1846                        $app_id  = (int) $app->id;
1847                        $yes     = $admission->count_positive_vouches( $app_id );
1848                        $bar_pct = $required > 0 ? min( 100, (int) round( $yes / $required * 100 ) ) : 100;
1849                        $bar_col = $yes >= $required ? '#00a32a' : '#2271b1';
1850                        ?>
1851                        <tr>
1852                            <td>
1853                                <strong><?php echo esc_html( $app->display_name ); ?></strong><br>
1854                                <span style="color:#666;font-size:12px"><?php echo esc_html( $app->email ); ?></span>
1855                            </td>
1856                            <td style="white-space:nowrap"><?php echo esc_html( date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $app->applied_at ) ) ); ?></td>
1857                            <td style="min-width:120px">
1858                                <div style="background:#ddd;border-radius:3px;height:6px;margin-bottom:4px">
1859                                    <div style="background:<?php echo esc_attr( $bar_col ); ?>;width:<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $bar_pct ); ?>%;height:6px;border-radius:3px"></div>
1860                                </div>
1861                                <?php
1862                                printf(
1863                                    /* translators: 1: yes votes received, 2: total votes required */
1864                                    esc_html__( '%1$d / %2$d', 'agnosis' ),
1865                                    (int) $yes,
1866                                    (int) $required
1867                                );
1868                                ?>
1869                            </td>
1870                            <td style="max-width:260px;font-size:12px">
1871                                <?php if ( $app->bio ) : ?>
1872                                    <span title="<?php echo esc_attr( $app->bio ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( wp_trim_words( $app->bio, 20 ) ); ?></span>
1873                                <?php endif; ?>
1874                                <?php if ( $app->portfolio_url ) : ?>
1875                                    <br><a href="<?php echo esc_url( $app->portfolio_url ); ?>" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer"><?php esc_html_e( 'Portfolio ↗', 'agnosis' ); ?></a>
1876                                <?php endif; ?>
1877                            </td>
1878                            <td style="white-space:nowrap">
1879                                <!-- Admit -->
1880                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:inline">
1881                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_admit_application">
1882                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1883                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_admit_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1884                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Admit', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
1885                                </form>
1886                                <!-- Reject -->
1887                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:inline;margin-left:4px">
1888                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_reject_application">
1889                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
1890                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_reject_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
1891                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Reject', 'agnosis' ), 'small delete', 'submit', false ); ?>
1892                                </form>
1893                            </td>
1894                        </tr>
1895                    <?php endforeach; ?>
1896                    </tbody>
1897                </table>
1898            <?php endif; ?>
1899        </div>
1900        <?php
1901    }
1902
1903    /**
1904     * admin-post handler: admit an applicant, bypassing the vouch threshold.
1905     */
1906    public function handle_admit_application(): void {
1907        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1908
1909        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_admit_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1910
1911        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1912            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1913        }
1914
1915        $admission = new Admission();
1916        $ok        = $admission->admin_admit( $app_id );
1917
1918        $redirect = add_query_arg(
1919            [
1920                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1921                'tab'             => 'community',
1922                'subtab'          => 'members',
1923                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'admitted' : 'admit_failed',
1924            ],
1925            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1926        );
1927
1928        wp_safe_redirect( $redirect );
1929        exit;
1930    }
1931
1932    /**
1933     * admin-post handler: reject an applicant.
1934     */
1935    public function handle_reject_application(): void {
1936        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
1937
1938        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_reject_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
1939
1940        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
1941            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
1942        }
1943
1944        $admission = new Admission();
1945        $ok        = $admission->admin_reject( $app_id );
1946
1947        $redirect = add_query_arg(
1948            [
1949                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
1950                'tab'             => 'community',
1951                'subtab'          => 'members',
1952                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'rejected' : 'reject_failed',
1953            ],
1954            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
1955        );
1956
1957        wp_safe_redirect( $redirect );
1958        exit;
1959    }
1960
1961    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1962    // Members dashboard (Community tab)
1963    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
1964
1965    /**
1966     * Render the admitted (and banned) members table on the Community tab.
1967     *
1968     * Shows every admitted/banned artist with Ban / Delete / Initiate Vote actions.
1969     */
1970    private function render_members_dashboard(): void {
1971        global $wpdb;
1972
1973        // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
1974        $members = $wpdb->get_results(
1975            "SELECT * FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications
1976             WHERE status IN ('admitted', 'banned')
1977             ORDER BY display_name ASC"
1978        );
1979
1980        ?>
1981        <div class="card" style="max-width:960px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
1982            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Members', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
1983
1984            <?php if ( empty( $members ) ) : ?>
1985                <p style="color:#666"><?php esc_html_e( 'No admitted members yet.', 'agnosis' ); ?></p>
1986            <?php else : ?>
1987                <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden">
1988                    <thead>
1989                        <tr>
1990                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1991                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1992                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Joined', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1993                            <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Actions', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
1994                        </tr>
1995                    </thead>
1996                    <tbody>
1997                    <?php foreach ( $members as $member ) : ?>
1998                        <?php
1999                        /** @var object{id: string, wp_user_id: string|null, display_name: string, email: string, status: string, resolved_at: string|null, banned_until: string|null} $member */
2000                        $app_id     = (int) $member->id;
2001                        $is_banned  = 'banned' === $member->status;
2002                        $status_col = $is_banned ? '#c0392b' : '#0a7c48';
2003                        $status_lbl = $is_banned
2004                            ? ( $member->banned_until
2005                                ? sprintf(
2006                                    /* translators: %s: date until which the artist is banned */
2007                                    __( 'Banned until %s', 'agnosis' ),
2008                                    date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $member->banned_until ) )
2009                                )
2010                                : __( 'Banned', 'agnosis' ) )
2011                            : __( 'Active', 'agnosis' );
2012                        ?>
2013                        <?php
2014                        // Bounce counter (security audit §5a): a dead artist inbox
2015                        // otherwise silently stops receiving review links — this
2016                        // count is the only operator-visible sign anything is wrong.
2017                        $bounce_count = $member->wp_user_id ? (int) get_user_meta( (int) $member->wp_user_id, '_agnosis_bounce_count', true ) : 0;
2018                        // Notification preferences (security audit §5b/§4a) — surfaced
2019                        // here for the same reason as the bounce badge: an operator
2020                        // wondering why a particular artist never votes on new
2021                        // applications, or never replies to a broadcast, has an
2022                        // immediate answer instead of having to guess.
2023                        $muted_broadcasts = $member->wp_user_id && '1' === get_user_meta( (int) $member->wp_user_id, '_agnosis_broadcast_optout', true );
2024                        $digest_mode      = $member->wp_user_id && 'digest' === get_user_meta( (int) $member->wp_user_id, '_agnosis_vote_email_mode', true );
2025                        ?>
2026                        <tr>
2027                            <td>
2028                                <strong><?php echo esc_html( $member->display_name ); ?></strong><br>
2029                                <span style="color:#666;font-size:12px"><?php echo esc_html( $member->email ); ?></span>
2030                                <?php if ( $bounce_count > 0 ) : ?>
2031                                    <br>
2032                                    <span style="color:#b34a4a;font-size:12px;font-weight:600" title="<?php esc_attr_e( 'This address has bounced or been reported as spam — mail may no longer be reaching this artist.', 'agnosis' ); ?>">
2033                                        <?php
2034                                        echo esc_html(
2035                                            sprintf(
2036                                                /* translators: %d: number of recorded bounces/complaints for this artist's address */
2037                                                _n( '⚠ %d bounce', '⚠ %d bounces', $bounce_count, 'agnosis' ),
2038                                                $bounce_count
2039                                            )
2040                                        );
2041                                        ?>
2042                                    </span>
2043                                <?php endif; ?>
2044                                <?php if ( $muted_broadcasts ) : ?>
2045                                    <br>
2046                                    <span style="color:#888;font-size:12px" title="<?php esc_attr_e( 'This artist has muted community broadcast messages.', 'agnosis' ); ?>">
2047                                        <?php esc_html_e( '🔇 Broadcasts muted', 'agnosis' ); ?>
2048                                    </span>
2049                                <?php endif; ?>
2050                                <?php if ( $digest_mode ) : ?>
2051                                    <br>
2052                                    <span style="color:#888;font-size:12px" title="<?php esc_attr_e( 'This artist receives one daily digest of open applications instead of an email per application.', 'agnosis' ); ?>">
2053                                        <?php esc_html_e( '📬 Vote digest mode', 'agnosis' ); ?>
2054                                    </span>
2055                                <?php endif; ?>
2056                            </td>
2057                            <td>
2058                                <span style="color:<?php echo esc_attr( $status_col ); ?>;font-weight:600;font-size:12px">
2059                                    <?php echo esc_html( $status_lbl ); ?>
2060                                </span>
2061                            </td>
2062                            <td style="white-space:nowrap;font-size:12px">
2063                                <?php echo $member->resolved_at ? esc_html( date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $member->resolved_at ) ) ) : '—'; ?>
2064                            </td>
2065                            <td style="white-space:nowrap">
2066                                <?php if ( ! $is_banned ) : ?>
2067                                    <!-- Temporary ban -->
2068                                    <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
2069                                          style="display:inline;margin-right:4px"
2070                                          onsubmit="return this.querySelector('[name=banned_until]').value !== '' || confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Leave the date blank to ban indefinitely. Continue?', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
2071                                        <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_ban_artist">
2072                                        <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
2073                                        <input type="date" name="banned_until" style="font-size:12px;padding:2px 4px"
2074                                               min="<?php echo esc_attr( gmdate( 'Y-m-d', strtotime( '+1 day' ) ) ); ?>"
2075                                               title="<?php esc_attr_e( 'Leave blank to ban indefinitely', 'agnosis' ); ?>">
2076                                        <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_ban_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
2077                                        <?php submit_button( __( 'Suspend', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2078                                    </form>
2079                                <?php endif; ?>
2080                                <!-- Permanent delete -->
2081                                <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
2082                                      style="display:inline;margin-right:4px"
2083                                      onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Permanently delete this artist and all their content? This cannot be undone.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
2084                                    <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_delete_artist">
2085                                    <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
2086                                    <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_delete_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
2087                                    <?php submit_button( __( 'Delete', 'agnosis' ), 'small delete', 'submit', false ); ?>
2088                                </form>
2089                                <?php if ( ! $is_banned ) : ?>
2090                                    <!-- Initiate community vote -->
2091                                    <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>"
2092                                          style="display:inline"
2093                                          onsubmit="return confirm('<?php echo esc_js( __( 'Open a community removal vote for this artist? All members will be emailed.', 'agnosis' ) ); ?>')">
2094                                        <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_initiate_removal_vote">
2095                                        <input type="hidden" name="application_id" value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $app_id ); ?>">
2096                                        <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_vote_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' ); ?>
2097                                        <?php submit_button( __( 'Open Vote', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2098                                    </form>
2099                                <?php endif; ?>
2100                            </td>
2101                        </tr>
2102                    <?php endforeach; ?>
2103                    </tbody>
2104                </table>
2105            <?php endif; ?>
2106        </div>
2107        <?php
2108    }
2109
2110    /**
2111     * admin-post handler: suspend (ban) an artist, optionally until a date.
2112     */
2113    public function handle_ban_artist(): void {
2114        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
2115
2116        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_ban_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
2117
2118        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2119            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2120        }
2121
2122        $raw_until = sanitize_text_field( wp_unslash( $_POST['banned_until'] ?? '' ) );
2123        $until     = ( '' !== $raw_until && strtotime( $raw_until ) )
2124            ? ( new \DateTimeImmutable( $raw_until ) )
2125            : null;
2126
2127        $departure = new Departure();
2128        $ok        = $departure->admin_ban( $app_id, $until );
2129
2130        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2131            [
2132                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2133                'tab'             => 'community',
2134                'subtab'          => 'members',
2135                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'banned' : 'ban_failed',
2136            ],
2137            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2138        ) );
2139        exit;
2140    }
2141
2142    /**
2143     * admin-post handler: permanently delete an artist and all their content.
2144     */
2145    public function handle_delete_artist(): void {
2146        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
2147
2148        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_delete_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
2149
2150        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2151            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2152        }
2153
2154        $departure = new Departure();
2155        $ok        = $departure->admin_delete( $app_id );
2156
2157        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2158            [
2159                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2160                'tab'             => 'community',
2161                'subtab'          => 'members',
2162                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'deleted' : 'delete_failed',
2163            ],
2164            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2165        ) );
2166        exit;
2167    }
2168
2169    /**
2170     * admin-post handler: open a community removal vote for an artist (admin bypass).
2171     */
2172    public function handle_initiate_removal_vote(): void {
2173        $app_id = absint( wp_unslash( $_POST['application_id'] ?? 0 ) );
2174
2175        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_vote_' . $app_id, 'agnosis_nonce' );
2176
2177        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2178            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2179        }
2180
2181        global $wpdb;
2182
2183        // Resolve subject user_id from application.
2184        $user_id = (int) $wpdb->get_var( // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.DirectQuery, WordPress.DB.DirectDatabaseQuery.NoCaching
2185            $wpdb->prepare(
2186                "SELECT user_id FROM {$wpdb->prefix}agnosis_applications WHERE id = %d",
2187                $app_id
2188            )
2189        );
2190
2191        if ( ! $user_id ) {
2192            wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2193                [ 'page' => 'agnosis-settings', 'tab' => 'community', 'subtab' => 'members', 'agnosis_message' => 'vote_open_failed' ],
2194                admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2195            ) );
2196            exit;
2197        }
2198
2199        $departure = new Departure();
2200        $ok        = $departure->admin_open_removal_vote( $user_id, get_current_user_id() );
2201
2202        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2203            [
2204                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2205                'tab'             => 'community',
2206                'subtab'          => 'members',
2207                'agnosis_message' => $ok ? 'vote_opened' : 'vote_open_failed',
2208            ],
2209            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2210        ) );
2211        exit;
2212    }
2213
2214    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2215    // Newsletter dashboard (Newsletter tab)
2216    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2217
2218    private function render_newsletter_dashboard(): void {
2219        // Self-heal a stuck 'Sending…' status the moment an admin views this
2220        // page, rather than only on WP-Cron's next tick — see
2221        // QueueProcessor::reconcile_sending_issues()'s docblock. Cheap (a
2222        // handful of small COUNT queries, no-op when nothing is 'sending').
2223        ( new QueueProcessor() )->reconcile_sending_issues();
2224
2225        // Also re-check the newsletter cron events themselves, unconditionally
2226        // (not just on a version bump) — see
2227        // Activator::ensure_newsletter_cron_scheduled()'s docblock for why:
2228        // found 2026-07-06, a site's agnosis_send_newsletter_queue event was
2229        // missing entirely, so nothing had ever reconciled it in the first
2230        // place. Logged only when something was actually missing, since a
2231        // re-registration happening at all is itself worth knowing about.
2232        if ( Activator::ensure_newsletter_cron_scheduled() ) {
2233            Logger::warning( 'Newsletter dashboard view found a missing newsletter cron event and re-registered it.', 'newsletter' );
2234        }
2235
2236        $scheduler        = new Scheduler();
2237        $sub_counts       = Subscriber::counts();
2238        $threshold        = (int) get_option( 'agnosis_newsletter_subscriber_warn_threshold', 250 );
2239        $artist_query     = new \WP_User_Query( [ 'role' => 'agnosis_artist', 'count_total' => true, 'number' => 0, 'fields' => 'ID' ] );
2240        $artist_total     = (int) $artist_query->get_total();
2241        $optout_query     = new \WP_User_Query( [
2242            'role'       => 'agnosis_artist',
2243            'count_total' => true,
2244            'number'     => 0,
2245            'fields'     => 'ID',
2246            'meta_key'   => '_agnosis_newsletter_optout', // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.SlowDBQuery.slow_db_query_meta_key -- small table (admitted artists only).
2247            'meta_value' => '1', // phpcs:ignore WordPress.DB.SlowDBQuery.slow_db_query_meta_value
2248        ] );
2249        $artist_optouts   = (int) $optout_query->get_total();
2250
2251        ?>
2252        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
2253            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Newsletter Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
2254
2255            <?php if ( $sub_counts['confirmed'] > $threshold ) : ?>
2256                <div class="notice notice-warning inline" style="margin:0 0 1rem">
2257                    <p>
2258                        <?php
2259                        echo esc_html(
2260                            sprintf(
2261                                /* translators: 1: confirmed public subscriber count, 2: configured comfort threshold */
2262                                __( 'You have %1$d confirmed public subscribers, above the configured comfort threshold of %2$d. Self-hosted sending still works, but you may want to connect an email service provider (e.g. Brevo\'s free tier) for better deliverability at this size.', 'agnosis' ),
2263                                (int) $sub_counts['confirmed'],
2264                                (int) $threshold
2265                            )
2266                        );
2267                        ?>
2268                    </p>
2269                </div>
2270            <?php endif; ?>
2271
2272            <table class="widefat striped" style="border-radius:4px;overflow:hidden;margin-bottom:1.5rem">
2273                <thead><tr>
2274                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Newsletter', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2275                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Audience', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2276                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Last sent', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2277                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Status', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2278                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Action', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2279                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Failed recipients', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2280                    <th><?php esc_html_e( 'Send a test', 'agnosis' ); ?></th>
2281                </tr></thead>
2282                <tbody>
2283                    <tr>
2284                        <td><strong><?php esc_html_e( 'Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong></td>
2285                        <td>
2286                            <?php
2287                            echo esc_html(
2288                                sprintf(
2289                                    /* translators: 1: admitted artist count, 2: how many of them opted out */
2290                                    __( '%1$d admitted (%2$d opted out)', 'agnosis' ),
2291                                    $artist_total,
2292                                    $artist_optouts
2293                                )
2294                            );
2295                            ?>
2296                        </td>
2297                        <td><?php echo esc_html( $this->format_last_sent( $scheduler->last_sent_at( 'artist' ) ) ); ?></td>
2298                        <td><?php echo $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'artist' ) ? esc_html__( 'Sending…', 'agnosis' ) : esc_html__( 'Idle', 'agnosis' ); ?></td>
2299                        <td>
2300                            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
2301                                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_now">
2302                                <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="artist">
2303                                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_artist' ); ?>
2304                                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Now', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false, $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'artist' ) ? [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ] : [] ); ?>
2305                            </form>
2306                        </td>
2307                        <td><?php $this->render_retry_failed_button( 'artist' ); ?></td>
2308                        <td><?php $this->render_newsletter_test_form( 'artist' ); ?></td>
2309                    </tr>
2310                    <tr>
2311                        <td><strong><?php esc_html_e( 'Public', 'agnosis' ); ?></strong></td>
2312                        <td>
2313                            <?php
2314                            echo esc_html(
2315                                sprintf(
2316                                    /* translators: 1: confirmed subscriber count, 2: pending confirmation count, 3: unsubscribed count, 4: bounced/suppressed count */
2317                                    __( '%1$d confirmed, %2$d pending confirmation, %3$d unsubscribed, %4$d bounced', 'agnosis' ),
2318                                    (int) $sub_counts['confirmed'],
2319                                    (int) $sub_counts['pending'],
2320                                    (int) $sub_counts['unsubscribed'],
2321                                    (int) $sub_counts['bounced']
2322                                )
2323                            );
2324                            ?>
2325                            <?php $locale_breakdown = $this->format_locale_breakdown(); ?>
2326                            <?php if ( '' !== $locale_breakdown ) : ?>
2327                                <div style="margin-top:.4rem;font-size:.85em;color:#666">
2328                                    <?php
2329                                    printf(
2330                                        /* translators: %s: comma-separated "Language (count)" breakdown of confirmed subscribers */
2331                                        esc_html__( 'By language: %s', 'agnosis' ),
2332                                        esc_html( $locale_breakdown )
2333                                    );
2334                                    ?>
2335                                </div>
2336                            <?php endif; ?>
2337                        </td>
2338                        <td><?php echo esc_html( $this->format_last_sent( $scheduler->last_sent_at( 'public' ) ) ); ?></td>
2339                        <td><?php echo $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'public' ) ? esc_html__( 'Sending…', 'agnosis' ) : esc_html__( 'Idle', 'agnosis' ); ?></td>
2340                        <td>
2341                            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>">
2342                                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_now">
2343                                <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="public">
2344                                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_public' ); ?>
2345                                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Now', 'agnosis' ), 'small', 'submit', false, $scheduler->has_issue_in_flight( 'public' ) ? [ 'disabled' => 'disabled' ] : [] ); ?>
2346                            </form>
2347                        </td>
2348                        <td><?php $this->render_retry_failed_button( 'public' ); ?></td>
2349                        <td><?php $this->render_newsletter_test_form( 'public' ); ?></td>
2350                    </tr>
2351                </tbody>
2352            </table>
2353
2354            <p class="description">
2355                <?php esc_html_e( 'Add the "Newsletter Signup" block to any page to let visitors subscribe to the public newsletter. Artists are enrolled automatically and can unsubscribe from any issue with one click.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
2356            </p>
2357        </div>
2358        <?php
2359    }
2360
2361    private function format_last_sent( ?string $mysql_datetime ): string {
2362        if ( ! $mysql_datetime ) {
2363            return __( 'Never', 'agnosis' );
2364        }
2365        return date_i18n( get_option( 'date_format' ), strtotime( $mysql_datetime ) );
2366    }
2367
2368    /**
2369     * Locale-coverage metric (audit §8 — "cheap signal for which LF languages
2370     * earn their AI translation spend"), built on Subscriber::counts_by_locale().
2371     * Returns '' when there are no confirmed subscribers to break down yet.
2372     */
2373    private function format_locale_breakdown(): string {
2374        $by_locale = Subscriber::counts_by_locale();
2375        if ( empty( $by_locale ) ) {
2376            return '';
2377        }
2378
2379        $parts = [];
2380        foreach ( $by_locale as $locale => $count ) {
2381            $parts[] = sprintf( '%1$s (%2$d)', $this->locale_label( $locale ), $count );
2382        }
2383
2384        return implode( ', ', $parts );
2385    }
2386
2387    /**
2388     * Human-readable language name for a subscriber's stored WP locale (e.g.
2389     * 'es_ES' -> 'Spanish'). Uses Lingua Forge's own display-name lookup when
2390     * LF is active — the same optional-dependency guard convention as the
2391     * rest of Compat\LinguaForge — falling back to the raw locale code when
2392     * LF isn't installed. An empty locale (never recorded — e.g. a subscriber
2393     * from before the §3c frontend.js fix) is labelled explicitly rather than
2394     * silently dropped, matching Subscriber::counts_by_locale()'s own '' bucket.
2395     */
2396    private function locale_label( string $locale ): string {
2397        if ( '' === $locale ) {
2398            return __( 'Unknown', 'agnosis' );
2399        }
2400
2401        if ( function_exists( 'linguaforge_language_label' ) ) {
2402            return (string) linguaforge_language_label( LinguaForge::locale_to_lang( $locale ) );
2403        }
2404
2405        return $locale;
2406    }
2407
2408    /**
2409     * "Retry Failed" button for the Newsletter dashboard (fifth/sixth audit
2410     * §5e). Shows the count of terminally-failed recipients for $type's most
2411     * recent issue and, when that count is above zero, a button that resets
2412     * them all back to 'pending' so the next few cron ticks retry them —
2413     * see QueueProcessor::retry_failed(). Previously an SMTP outage longer
2414     * than MAX_ATTEMPTS worth of cron ticks (~15 minutes) left those
2415     * recipients permanently skipped with no resend affordance at all.
2416     */
2417    private function render_retry_failed_button( string $type ): void {
2418        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
2419        $failed    = $scheduler->failed_count_for_latest_issue( $type );
2420
2421        if ( 0 === $failed ) {
2422            esc_html_e( 'None', 'agnosis' );
2423            return;
2424        }
2425        ?>
2426        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.4rem;align-items:center">
2427            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_retry_failed_newsletter_recipients">
2428            <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $type ); ?>">
2429            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_retry_failed_newsletter_recipients_' . $type ); ?>
2430            <span>
2431                <?php
2432                echo esc_html(
2433                    sprintf(
2434                        /* translators: %d: number of recipients whose send permanently failed for the most recent issue */
2435                        _n( '%d failed', '%d failed', $failed, 'agnosis' ),
2436                        $failed
2437                    )
2438                );
2439                ?>
2440            </span>
2441            <?php submit_button( __( 'Retry Failed', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2442        </form>
2443        <?php
2444    }
2445
2446    /**
2447     * Inline "send a preview to one address" form for the Newsletter dashboard.
2448     *
2449     * Defaults to the current admin's own email. Sending a test does not touch
2450     * the schedule, the issues table, or any subscriber — see Scheduler::send_test().
2451     */
2452    private function render_newsletter_test_form( string $type ): void {
2453        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
2454        ?>
2455        <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.4rem;align-items:center">
2456            <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_newsletter_test">
2457            <input type="hidden" name="newsletter_type" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $type ); ?>">
2458            <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_test_' . $type ); ?>
2459            <input type="email" name="test_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $current_user->user_email ); ?>" required class="small-text" style="width:14rem">
2460            <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Test', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2461        </form>
2462        <?php
2463    }
2464
2465    /**
2466     * admin-post handler: manually trigger a newsletter issue right now.
2467     */
2468    public function handle_send_newsletter_now(): void {
2469        $type = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['newsletter_type'] ?? '' ) );
2470
2471        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_' . $type );
2472
2473        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2474            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2475        }
2476
2477        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
2478        $result    = $scheduler->send_now( $type );
2479
2480        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2481            [
2482                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2483                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
2484                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'newsletter_sent' : 'newsletter_send_failed',
2485            ],
2486            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2487        ) );
2488        exit;
2489    }
2490
2491    /**
2492     * admin-post handler: reset all permanently-failed recipients of $type's
2493     * most recent newsletter issue back to 'pending' so cron retries them
2494     * (audit §5e). See QueueProcessor::retry_failed() and
2495     * render_retry_failed_button().
2496     */
2497    public function handle_retry_failed_newsletter_recipients(): void {
2498        $type = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['newsletter_type'] ?? '' ) );
2499
2500        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_retry_failed_newsletter_recipients_' . $type );
2501
2502        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2503            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2504        }
2505
2506        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
2507        $issue_id  = $scheduler->latest_issue_id( $type );
2508        $requeued  = null !== $issue_id ? ( new QueueProcessor() )->retry_failed( $issue_id ) : 0;
2509
2510        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2511            [
2512                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2513                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
2514                'agnosis_message' => $requeued > 0 ? 'newsletter_retry_queued' : 'newsletter_retry_none',
2515            ],
2516            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2517        ) );
2518        exit;
2519    }
2520
2521    /**
2522     * admin-post handler: send a one-off preview of the next issue to a single
2523     * address. Does not touch the schedule, issues table, or any subscriber.
2524     */
2525    public function handle_send_newsletter_test(): void {
2526        $type = sanitize_key( wp_unslash( $_POST['newsletter_type'] ?? '' ) );
2527
2528        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_newsletter_test_' . $type );
2529
2530        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
2531            wp_die( esc_html__( 'You do not have permission to perform this action.', 'agnosis' ) );
2532        }
2533
2534        $test_email = sanitize_email( wp_unslash( $_POST['test_email'] ?? '' ) );
2535
2536        $scheduler = new Scheduler();
2537        $result    = $scheduler->send_test( $type, $test_email );
2538
2539        wp_safe_redirect( add_query_arg(
2540            [
2541                'page'            => 'agnosis-settings',
2542                'tab'             => 'newsletter',
2543                'agnosis_message' => true === $result ? 'newsletter_test_sent' : 'newsletter_test_failed',
2544            ],
2545            admin_url( 'admin.php' )
2546        ) );
2547        exit;
2548    }
2549
2550    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2551    // Invite an artist (Community tab; Artist\Invitation — separate from the
2552    // newsletter system: one ad-hoc recipient, no list, no queue, nothing tracked)
2553    // -------------------------------------------------------------------------
2554
2555    /**
2556     * "Invite an Artist" card — a single-recipient, language-selectable
2557     * invitation email. Rendered on the Community tab, alongside the
2558     * admission/members dashboards it's most closely related to.
2559     */
2560    private function render_invitation_card(): void {
2561        $languages = SubmissionTranslator::language_names();
2562        ksort( $languages );
2563        $current_user = wp_get_current_user();
2564        ?>
2565        <div class="card" style="max-width:900px;margin-top:1.5rem;padding:1rem 1.5rem">
2566            <h2 style="margin-top:0"><?php esc_html_e( 'Invite an Artist', 'agnosis' ); ?></h2>
2567            <p class="description" style="margin-top:0">
2568                <?php esc_html_e( 'Send a one-off email inviting someone to apply. Nothing is tracked or scheduled — this sends immediately to the address below.', 'agnosis' ); ?>
2569            </p>
2570
2571            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap;margin-bottom:.8rem">
2572                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_invitation">
2573                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_invitation' ); ?>
2574                <input type="email" name="invitation_email" placeholder="<?php esc_attr_e( 'artist@example.com', 'agnosis' ); ?>" required class="regular-text" style="width:16rem">
2575                <select name="invitation_language">
2576                    <?php foreach ( $languages as $code => $label ) : ?>
2577                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $code ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( $label ); ?></option>
2578                    <?php endforeach; ?>
2579                </select>
2580                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Invitation', 'agnosis' ), 'primary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2581            </form>
2582
2583            <form method="post" action="<?php echo esc_url( admin_url( 'admin-post.php' ) ); ?>" style="display:flex;gap:.6rem;align-items:center;flex-wrap:wrap">
2584                <input type="hidden" name="action" value="agnosis_send_invitation_test">
2585                <?php wp_nonce_field( 'agnosis_send_invitation_test' ); ?>
2586                <input type="email" name="invitation_test_email" value="<?php echo esc_attr( $current_user->user_email ); ?>" required class="regular-text" style="width:16rem">
2587                <select name="invitation_language">
2588                    <?php foreach ( $languages as $code => $label ) : ?>
2589                        <option value="<?php echo esc_attr( (string) $code ); ?>"><?php echo esc_html( $label ); ?></option>
2590                    <?php endforeach; ?>
2591                </select>
2592                <?php submit_button( __( 'Send Test', 'agnosis' ), 'secondary small', 'submit', false ); ?>
2593            </form>
2594        </div>
2595        <?php
2596    }
2597
2598    /**
2599     * admin-post handler: send a real invitation.
2600     */
2601    public function handle_send_invitation(): void {
2602        check_admin_referer( 'agnosis_send_invitation' );
2603
2604        if ( ! current_user_can( 'manage_options' ) ) {
